$description: Mapping from the current Flowise credential names (as captured in the 2026-04-20 audit) to the canonical `<provider>.<purpose>` scheme defined in docs/plans/2026-04-20-backend-scaling-plan.md § 4. The reconcile function `Invoke-LargoCredentialRename` in Update-LargoFlowise.ps1 (dry-run by default) consumes this mapping to PATCH Flowise credentials via `/api/v1/credentials/{id}`.

renames.notes: Primary OpenAI key used by chatflow nodes. After rename, set up a secondary `openai.embedding` key if embeddings move back to OpenAI.
Dev / sandbox OpenAI key. Scoped to /largo/dev in Infisical once Wave 10.4 lands.
Gemini 2.5 Pro — used as a fallback chat model.
TTS output for the voice surface.
Web-search fallback. Disambiguate from the OpenAI `Mitch` by `credentialType` during the PATCH.
Read-only PAT used by internal tooling flows.
Supabase project key; unused at 2026-04-20 — retire if still unused in 30 d.
Brave web search — fallback search provider.
Mistral API key used by chat models. A second `mistral.embedding` entry already exists via the same key — keep both so rotation is granular.
Qdrant API key — scoped for Flowise's retriever/vector-store nodes. A separate `qdrant.client` will be created for the Largo-process client in Wave 6.11.
Postgres record manager for document-store dedup — keep this binding untouched across rotations to avoid losing the dedup history.

newCredentialsToCreate.name: insee.sirene
newCredentialsToCreate.notes: Wave 1.2 — OAuth bearer for api.insee.fr. The actual OAuth flow runs server-side; Flowise receives the refreshed access token via Infisical / Coolify env (Wave 10.4).

newCredentialsToCreate.name: browserless.api
newCredentialsToCreate.notes: Wave 10.2 — Browserless token (unused until Backend A is adopted).

newCredentialsToCreate.name: rsshub.admin
newCredentialsToCreate.notes: Wave 10.3 — RSSHub admin token (unused until Backend A is adopted).

newCredentialsToCreate.name: langfuse.public
newCredentialsToCreate.notes: Wave 10.5 — Langfuse public key for LLM trace fan-out.

newCredentialsToCreate.name: smtp.largo
newCredentialsToCreate.notes: Wave 5 — SMTP credentials for the email-draft flow's send side-channel.
